title: pipeline-diagnostics step result
description: Sidecar schema for the pipeline-diagnostics workflow step. Written by pipeline_diagnostics.py --emit-sidecar — every field is derived from the computed analysis, never hand-authored.

ticket.description: JIRA ticket ID as provided by the user (preserves original case)

pipeline_status.description: Overall pipeline status from the progress file

context_pressure_score.description: Numeric risk score from the diagnostics heuristic

failure_count.description: Total failures detected across all steps

bottleneck_count.description: Number of steps flagged as bottlenecks

orchestrator_issue_count.description: Number of orchestrator-level problems found by self-introspection

workaround_count.description: Number of script workarounds recorded in the progress file

total_duration_min.description: Total pipeline duration in minutes (from file mtimes), or null if not computable
